pageContext.name: Festering Fingerprint Vyke
pageContext.description: The first release in the new S.H.Figuarts ELDEN RING series! Festering Fingerprint Vyke is fully articulated, with flexible materials used for dynamic and unhindered posing. The set also includes both Vyke's War Spear and the Flame of frenzy effect parts, letting you re-create dramatic scenes. Standing 6.3' high, this knight of the Roundtable this invader will cast an imposing presence in your collection. Arise now, ye tarnished.
